data.name: 256BitSslDescription
data.value: Secure shopping with 256 bit SSL certificate

data.name: AccessDeniedDescription
data.value: You do not have permission to access this page

data.name: BrowseProductsToOrder
data.value: Browse products to place an order

data.name: CancelOrderConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to cancel this order?

data.name: CancelNotAllowed
data.value: This order can no longer be cancelled. Only orders in preparation can be cancelled.

data.name: NoOrdersInFilter
data.value: No orders found in this filter

data.name: CarefullyPackagedDesc
data.value: Your products are carefully packaged and shipped

data.name: ClearCartConfirm
data.value: All items in your cart will be removed

data.name: ConfirmDeleteAccount
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete your account?

data.name: ConfirmDeleteAddress
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this address?

data.name: ConfirmRemoveFavorite
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove from favorites?

data.name: DeleteAccountMessage
data.value: Your account will be permanently deleted

data.name: DeliveryDescription
data.value: Your order is carefully prepared and delivered

data.name: DesignPreparedDesc
data.value: Your design is prepared with care

data.name: EmailConfirmationErrorDescription
data.value: Confirmation link is invalid or expired

data.name: EmailConfirmationSuccessDescription
data.value: Your email address has been verified

data.name: FavoriteDescription
data.value: Add products you like to your favorites

data.name: ForgotPasswordDescription
data.value: Enter your email and we will send you a reset link

data.name: FullAddressPlaceholder
data.value: Street, avenue, building no, apartment no...

data.name: HomeMetaDescription
data.value: Canvas prints and posters at affordable prices

data.name: NewsletterDescription
data.value: Stay informed about campaigns and deals

data.name: OrderCompleteDescription
data.value: Your order has been completed successfully

data.name: OrderRequestInfo
data.value: Your order request has been received

data.name: ProductPreparedDesc
data.value: Your product is made to order

data.name: ProductionStoryDesc
data.value: Every product is made with care

data.name: SaveAddressToAccount
data.value: Address will be saved to your account

data.name: TryDifferentCategoryOrSearch
data.value: Try a different category or search

data.name: YourOrderPreparedWithCare
data.value: Your order is being prepared with care

data.name: AddressPlaceholder
data.value: Neighborhood, Street, Building No, Apartment No...

data.name: IdentityPhotoHelp
data.value: Upload the front of your ID in PNG, JPEG or WebP format

data.name: IdentityPhotoRequiredWarning
data.value: An identity photo is required for registration. Registration cannot be completed without an identity photo.

data.name: Hesap_EmailVerificationError
data.value: Error: Email could not be verified.

data.name: Hesap_PleaseVerifyEmail
data.value: Please verify your account using the link sent to your email address.

data.name: Hesap_EnterRegisteredEmail
data.value: Please enter your registered email address.

data.name: Hesap_PasswordResetLinkSent
data.value: If this email is registered in the system, a password reset link has been sent.

data.name: Hesap_InvalidOrExpiredLink
data.value: This link is invalid or has expired.

data.name: Hesap_LinkExpired
data.value: Operation failed. The link may have expired.

data.name: Hesap_PasswordUpdated
data.value: Your password has been updated successfully. You can now log in.

data.name: Hesap_AccountCreatedEmailSent
data.value: Your membership has been created. A verification link has been sent to your email address.

data.name: Hesap_AccountCreatedEmailFailed
data.value: Your membership has been created but the verification email could not be sent:

data.name: Hesap_PasswordResetSuccess
data.value: A password reset link has been sent to your email address.

data.name: Hesap_PasswordResetFailed
data.value: Failed to send password reset email:

data.name: Sepet_CouponNotActive
data.value: This coupon is not currently active.

data.name: Sepet_CouponUsageLimitExceeded
data.value: This coupon has reached its usage limit.

data.name: Sepet_CouponMinCartNotMet
data.value: Your cart total must be at least {0} to use this coupon.

data.name: Sepet_ProductAddFailed
data.value: Product could not be added to cart

data.name: Sepet_CartClearFailed
data.value: An error occurred while clearing the cart.

data.name: Favori_PriceDropNotificationOn
data.value: We will notify you via email when the price of this product drops.

data.name: Favori_NotInWishlist
data.value: This product was not found in your wishlist.

data.name: Kurumsal_FillAllFields
data.value: Please fill in all fields completely.

data.name: Kurumsal_MessageSent
data.value: Your message has been sent successfully. We will get back to you as soon as possible.

data.name: Urun_ReviewReceived
data.value: Your review has been received. It will be published after approval.

data.name: Home_InvalidEmail
data.value: Please enter a valid email address.

data.name: Home_AlreadySubscribed
data.value: This email address is already subscribed to the newsletter.

data.name: Home_SubscriptionFailed
data.value: Subscription could not be saved at this time. Please try again later.

data.name: Home_SubscriptionSuccess
data.value: Your subscription has been created successfully.

data.name: Home_ReviewNameCommentRequired
data.value: Full name and comment fields are required.

data.name: Home_ReviewReceived
data.value: Your review has been received. It will be published after approval.

data.name: Profil_ReturnOnlyDelivered
data.value: You can only create a return request for delivered orders.

data.name: Profil_ReturnAlreadyExists
data.value: You already have a return request for this order.

data.name: Profil_ReturnRequestExists
data.value: You already have a return request for this order.

data.name: Profil_ReturnRequestReceived
data.value: Your return request has been received. Order status updated.

data.name: Profil_OrderCannotCancel
data.value: This order can no longer be cancelled. Only orders in preparation can be cancelled.

data.name: Profil_WrongPassword
data.value: The password you entered is incorrect. Please try again.

data.name: Profil_AccountDeleted
data.value: Your account has been deleted successfully. Thank you for choosing us.

data.name: Profil_AccountDeleteFailed
data.value: An error occurred while deleting your account. Please try again.

data.name: Profil_ReturnOnlyDeliveredPost
data.value: Return request can only be created for delivered orders.

data.name: Siparis_FormValidationError
data.value: Please fill in all delivery information completely and in a valid format.

data.name: Siparis_PaymentPending
data.value: Awaiting payment/approval. Order created as pending until PayTR payment integration is complete.

data.name: Siparis_EmailRequired
data.value: A valid email address must be entered.

data.name: Siparis_PhoneRequired
data.value: Phone must be an 11-digit number starting with 0.

data.name: Siparis_AddressRequired
data.value: Address must be at least 10 characters.

data.name: Profil_EmailReturnReceivedBody
data.value: Your return request for order {0} has been received. Our team will review your request and contact you with the next steps.

data.name: Profil_EmailReturnTrackBody
data.value: You can track the return process from your account order details.

data.name: Profil_EmailAdminNewReturnHeading
data.value: A new return request has been submitted

data.name: Admin_CarkOdul_Subtitle
data.value: Manage spin-the-wheel prizes. Sort, language, color and type settings.

data.name: Admin_CarkOdul_DeleteConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete?

data.name: Admin_HaberBandi_Subtitle
data.value: Manage the scrolling news ticker. Active news will appear at the top of the site.

data.name: Admin_HaberBandi_LinkHelp
data.value: Leave empty to show only text.

data.name: Admin_HaberBandi_PreviewDesc
data.value: Live preview as it appears on the site (auto-scrolling ticker).

data.name: Siparis_EmailOrderReceivedBody
data.value: We have received your order. We will notify you when the payment/approval process is complete.

data.name: Siparis_EmailTrackOrderText
data.value: You can track your order status from the page.

data.name: Siparis_EmailContactText
data.value: If you have any questions or requests, please contact us.

data.name: Siparis_EmailAutoFooter
data.value: This email was sent automatically. Please do not reply directly.

data.name: Siparis_FileUploadError
data.value: An error occurred while uploading the file. Please try again.

data.name: Home_NewsletterWelcome
data.value: Welcome to the {0} newsletter. New collections, campaigns and announcements will reach you first.

data.name: Home_AdminNewSubscriberBody
data.value: A new person has subscribed to the newsletter.

data.name: GiftWrapDesc
data.value: Carefully wrapped, ideal for special occasions

data.name: FreeShippingCheckoutBanner
data.value: Add {0} more to your cart for free shipping!

data.name: DeliverToAddressDesc
data.value: Your order will be shipped to your address

data.name: StorePickupDesc
data.value: Pick up your order from our store

data.name: StorePickupAddressInfo
data.value: We will notify you when your order is ready. You can pick it up from our store.

data.name: StorePickupAddress
data.value: Molla Fenari Mah., Turk Ocagi Cad. No:3, Fatih/Istanbul

data.name: OrderNotePlaceholder
data.value: Write a note about your order...

data.name: Siparis_TermsRequired
data.value: You must accept the terms and conditions to proceed.

data.name: IdentityPhotoDesc
data.value: Take or upload an identity photo for payment confirmation

data.name: BankTransferDesc
data.value: If you wish to pay by bank transfer, please use the account details below. Don't forget to include your order number in the transfer description.

data.name: Siparis_CODLimitExceeded
data.value: Cash on delivery is not available for orders above {0} {1}. Please select bank transfer.

data.name: PrescriptionPhotoDesc
data.value: Your cart contains medical products requiring a prescription. Please upload a photo or PDF of your valid prescription.

data.name: Siparis_PrescriptionRequired
data.value: Uploading a prescription is required to complete this order.

data.name: Siparis_WholesaleMinOrder
data.value: Minimum order amount for wholesale customers is {0} {1}.

data.name: WholesaleGroupSelectHint
data.value: Select which wholesale group this product belongs to.

data.name: WholesaleSearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by name, email, phone or ID number...

data.name: WholesaleRejectReasonHint
data.value: This will only be visible in admin records.

data.name: ShippingAreaDeleteWithCities
data.value: area and all its cities will be deleted!

data.name: ErrorMessage
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. If the problem persists, please contact us.

data.name: PageNotFoundMessage
data.value: The page you are looking for may have been moved, deleted, or never existed. Don't worry, you can continue exploring our collections.

data.name: DevelopmentModeInfo
data.value: Swapping to Development environment will display more detailed information about the error.

data.name: DevelopmentModeWarning
data.value: The Development environment shouldn't be enabled for deployed applications.

data.name: SiteReviewDescription
data.value: Rate your 7ANRPS48.com experience. Your opinions are valuable to us.

data.name: LoginRequiredMessage
data.value: You need to log in to shop. If you are not a member yet, you can register.

data.name: WholesaleRegistrationInfo
data.value: Your wholesale registration will be activated after admin approval. You can view wholesale prices after approval.

data.name: ImageUrlHelp
data.value: Paste an image link from the internet for now.

data.name: VariantLastXItems
data.value: Only {0} items left of this variant.

data.name: AboutQuote
data.value: Carefully selected works for living spaces, clean operation and reliable service.

data.name: OurStoryContent
data.value: 7ANRPS48 is a Palestine e-commerce brand established to bring art and aesthetics to your walls. Each product is carefully designed and produced to reflect the cultural heritage of the region.

data.name: OurVisionContent
data.value: Not just selling products; adding value to our customers' living spaces with high-quality materials and unique designs.

data.name: WhyUsPremiumContent
data.value: High-resolution printing and 100% cotton canvas fabric.

data.name: WhyUsShippingContent
data.value: Damage-free delivery guarantee with corner protectors and reinforced packaging.

data.name: ContactUsDescription
data.value: You can reach us for your custom projects, wholesale purchases, or any questions.

data.name: ContactDescription
data.value: Contact us for your questions. We will respond as soon as possible.

data.name: MessageSentSuccess
data.value: Your message has been sent successfully.

data.name: ConnectionErrorRetry
data.value: Connection error occurred. Please try again.

data.name: FAQWhenShipped
data.value: When will my order be shipped?

data.name: FAQWhenShippedAnswer
data.value: Your orders are prepared within the production time stated on the product detail page and shipped as soon as possible.

data.name: FAQShippingCost
data.value: How much is the shipping cost?

data.name: FAQShippingCostAnswer
data.value: Shipping cost varies depending on your delivery address and the shipping company you choose. Follow the site for free shipping campaigns.

data.name: FAQTrackOrder
data.value: How can I track my order?

data.name: FAQTrackOrderAnswer
data.value: You will be notified when your order is delivered to the courier. You can track your orders from your profile page.

data.name: FAQMaterialsAnswer
data.value: We use high-quality materials in our products. Each product is manufactured to be long-lasting.

data.name: FAQFadeAnswer
data.value: No, UV-resistant inks and lamination coating provide protection against fading.

data.name: FAQCleaningAnswer
data.value: Clean your products by wiping with a slightly damp cloth. Do not use acetone or abrasive cleaning agents.

data.name: FAQReturnAnswer
data.value: Yes, you can create a return request within 14 days from the date of delivery.

data.name: IntroContent
data.value: At 7ANRPS48, we take the protection of your personal data very seriously. This policy explains what information we collect and how we use it.

data.name: InfoCollectedContent
data.value: We collect your name, email, phone, and address information through the order process and contact form.

data.name: InfoUsageContent
data.value: Collected information is used only to process your orders and provide you with better service.

data.name: SecurityContent
data.value: All payment transactions are protected with 256-bit SSL certificate. Your credit card information is not stored.

data.name: CookiesContent
data.value: Our website uses cookies to remember your cart and improve your experience.

data.name: GeneralReturnTermsContent
data.value: Customer satisfaction is our priority. You can create a return request if you are not satisfied with our products.

data.name: ReturnCondition
data.value: The product you want to return must be unused and its packaging must be undamaged.

data.name: ReturnHowTo
data.value: You can easily create a Return Request by going to your Profile page.

data.name: ReturnShipping
data.value: After your return request is approved, you can send the product back free of charge with the shipping code provided to you.

data.name: DamagedProductsContent
data.value: If you detect damage to the product packaging or the product itself during courier delivery, please contact us within 48 hours.

data.name: CustomDesignProductsContent
data.value: Returns of custom-made products are not accepted. However, exchange is made in case of manufacturing defects.

data.name: RefundContent
data.value: Your refund process is completed within 3-5 business days after the product reaches our warehouse.

data.name: ContractParties
data.value: Seller: 7ANRPS48. Buyer: Real or legal person purchasing products or services through the website. Current contact information for the Seller can be accessed from the Contact page.

data.name: ContractSubject
data.value: The subject of this contract is the sale, delivery, right of withdrawal, return conditions of products ordered by the buyer in electronic environment and the determination of mutual rights and obligations of the parties.

data.name: ContractProducts
data.value: The product name, quantity, variation selection, sale price, payment method, delivery address and order date are included in the order summary screen and order records. In products with custom size, design or production preferences, the production process starts after order confirmation.

data.name: ContractDelivery
data.value: Orders are delivered to the courier within the specified preparation period according to the product type and production intensity. Delays caused by the shipping company in shipments may be beyond the direct control of the seller.

data.name: ContractWithdrawal
data.value: Withdrawal and return requests for standard products are evaluated within the framework of the relevant legislation. The right of withdrawal may be limited in products prepared with the customer's special size, special design, personalization or custom production preferences. For detailed information, please review the Return Conditions page.

data.name: ContractPayment
data.value: Payment transactions are carried out through a secure payment infrastructure. Card information is not stored on 7ANRPS48 servers. Security verifications used during payment are performed by your bank or payment provider.

data.name: ContractDispute
data.value: In case of disputes that may arise between the parties, competent consumer arbitration committees and consumer courts are authorized within the framework of the applicable consumer legislation.

data.name: ContractIntro
data.value: This contract explains the distance sales conditions between the buyer and the seller for orders placed through 7ANRPS48. The customer who places the order is deemed to have accepted the basic conditions in this contract when completing the payment step.

data.name: UserAgreementParties
data.value: This User Agreement ("Agreement") is executed between the real person ("User") using the website ("Site") operated by 7ANRPS48 and 7ANRPS48.

data.name: UserAgreementSubject
data.value: This Agreement regulates the terms of use of the Site by the User and the mutual rights and obligations within this scope.

data.name: UserAgreementTerms
data.value: The Site can only be used for personal and non-commercial purposes. The User cannot use the Site for illegal purposes. Providing false or misleading information is strictly prohibited. All content on the Site belongs to 7ANRPS48 and is under copyright protection.

data.name: UserAgreementPrivacy
data.value: Personal information belonging to the User is protected within the scope of our Privacy Policy. For details, please review our Privacy Policy page.

data.name: UserAgreementPayment
data.value: All payment transactions are carried out through a secure payment infrastructure. Your card information is never stored on 7ANRPS48 servers.

data.name: UserAgreementChanges
data.value: 7ANRPS48 reserves the right to change this Agreement without prior notice. The current agreement is always available on this page.

data.name: UserAgreementContact
data.value: For questions regarding the Agreement, you can reach us through our Contact page.

data.name: Admin_Siparis_stok_ve_trafik_gorunumunun_tek_ekrandaki_ozeti
data.value: ملخص الطلبات والمخزون والزيارات في شاشة واحدة.

data.name: Admin_ProductCatalogDesc
data.value: Manage products in a fast paginated admin screen with light visual load.

data.name: Admin_CompleteSkusConfirm
data.value: Complete empty or duplicate SKUs automatically with unique SKUs?

data.name: Admin_ProductSearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search title, SKU, barcode or ID

data.name: Admin_SelectedPermanentDeleteConfirm
data.value: Warning: selected products will be permanently deleted. Continue?

data.name: Admin_ProductPermanentDeleteConfirm
data.value: Warning: this product will be permanently deleted. Continue?

data.name: Admin_PageInfo
data.value: Page {0} / {1} - {2} products shown on this page.

data.name: Admin_ProductCreateDesc
data.value: Enter only the required information for the first save. Detailed features are edited after saving the product.

data.name: Admin_ProductSaveFailed
data.value: Product could not be saved. Please check the fields below:

data.name: Admin_PriceVariantHelpTitle
data.value: How do sale price and variation price work?

data.name: Admin_PriceVariantHelpText
data.value: The sale price on this screen is the main product price. When saving, the system automatically creates a default variation with this price. You can add custom prices for different sizes or variations after saving.

data.name: Admin_ProductCreateHelp
data.value: Create the product quickly here. After saving, you can add variations, gallery, video and SEO details from the edit page.

data.name: Admin_ProductAutoSlugHelp
data.value: These fields are generated automatically as you type the product name. They can be changed after saving if needed.

data.name: Admin_MainImageHelp
data.value: If you do not upload a file, you can enter an existing image URL. One of them is enough.

data.name: Admin_AdditionalImagesHelp
data.value: You can select multiple images. These images will be added to the product gallery.

data.name: Admin_DetailedDescriptionPlaceholder
data.value: Write product information, usage area or quality description.

data.name: Admin_SeoInfoHelp
data.value: Customized meta tags for search engines. If left empty, automatic product information is used.

data.name: Admin_SeoTitleHelp
data.value: Shown as bold text. 60-70 characters recommended.

data.name: Admin_SeoDescriptionPlaceholder
data.value: Ex: Quality Palestine themed gift sets. Fast delivery and secure packaging.

data.name: Admin_SeoDescriptionHelp
data.value: Shown in search results. 150-160 characters recommended.

data.name: Admin_VariationAfterSaveTitle
data.value: Variations and size information are edited after saving.

data.name: Admin_VariationAfterSaveText
data.value: After the first save, you can manage size, stock and variation prices from the product edit screen.

data.name: Admin_ProductNameEmpty
data.value: Product name has not been entered yet

data.name: Admin_AfterSaveDetails
data.value: You can expand details after saving.

data.name: Admin_AutoCreateAfterSave
data.value: Will be created automatically after saving:

data.name: Admin_AdditionalImagesSelected
data.value: {0} additional images selected. They will be added to the gallery after saving.

data.name: Admin_AdvancedVariantsDesc
data.value: Manage size, material, personalization and logistics fields here.

data.name: Admin_NoVariantsYet
data.value: No variations added yet. You can leave it empty for single-price products or create the first combination.

data.name: Admin_VariationSubtitleDefault
data.value: Define a combination with size and price data.

data.name: Admin_MediaRecordsDesc
data.value: Manage gallery, video and user images from one list.

data.name: Admin_NoAdvancedMedia
data.value: No advanced media records yet. Main image and classic gallery uploads still work from the upper form.

data.name: Admin_ProductTypeHelp
data.value: This selection determines which dynamic fields open for the product. General fields remain visible for every product type.

data.name: Admin_NoFeatureFieldsForType
data.value: No feature fields are defined for the selected product type.

data.name: Admin_FeatureSummary
data.value: {0} fields shown. {1} marked as ready for filtering.

data.name: Admin_WhatsappOrderHelp
data.value: Shows WhatsApp button instead of cart.

data.name: Admin_HiddenPriceHelp
data.value: Price is hidden and quote is requested.

data.name: Admin_WholesaleGroupHelp
data.value: Select which wholesale group the product belongs to.

data.name: Admin_WholesalePriceHelp
data.value: Special price shown to wholesalers. If left empty, it is calculated automatically.

data.name: Admin_ShortDescriptionPlaceholder2
data.value: Quick sales sentence for list and product detail

data.name: Admin_DetailedDescriptionPlaceholder2
data.value: Describe product usage, quality and benefits

data.name: Admin_OrderManagementDesc
data.value: Track orders with operation, shipping and customer details from one screen.

data.name: Admin_OrderSearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search order no, customer, phone or email

data.name: Admin_OrderCancelConfirm
data.value: This order will be cancelled. Are you sure?

data.name: Admin_SelectAtLeastOneOrder
data.value: Please select at least one order

data.name: Admin_BulkShippedConfirm
data.value: {0} orders will be set to "Shipped". Continue?

data.name: Admin_BulkPackingConfirm
data.value: {0} orders will be set to "Packing". Continue?

data.name: Admin_BulkCancelConfirm
data.value: {0} orders will be cancelled and customers will be emailed. Continue?

data.name: Admin_ShippingPageDesc
data.value: Manage shipping companies, tracking links and label sender details used in orders.

data.name: Admin_ShippingRegionsCitiesDesc
data.value: Manage shipping areas and cities for Palestinian provinces and other regions.

data.name: Admin_PalestineProvinceShippingPricesDesc
data.value: Manage delivery fees for Palestinian provinces by shipping company.

data.name: Admin_PriceLoadError
data.value: An error occurred while loading prices.

data.name: Admin_NoCarrierProvince
data.value: An active carrier and Palestine province are required to define prices.

data.name: Admin_NoRegionYet
data.value: No region has been added yet.

data.name: Admin_DeleteRegionConfirm
data.value: Region "{0}" and all its cities will be deleted!

data.name: Admin_BulkDeliveredConfirm
data.value: {0} orders will be marked as delivered. Continue?

data.name: Admin_BulkShippingLabelsReady
data.value: {0} order labels are ready to print.

data.name: Admin_TrackingPlaceholder
data.value: Visible on label when tracking number is entered

data.name: Admin_UploadInvoiceFromForm
data.value: You can upload an invoice using the form above.

data.name: Admin_Kategori_YonetimiDesc
data.value: Manage parent categories, subcategories, SEO and store visibility from a single screen.

data.name: Admin_Kategori_Arama
data.value: Category name, slug or SEO title

data.name: Admin_NoMatchingCategories
data.value: No categories matching the criteria were found.

data.name: Admin_Yeni_KategoriDesc
data.value: Create a parent or subcategory; the store menu will update automatically.

data.name: Admin_Kategori_Aciklamasi_Placeholder
data.value: Description to be used on the category page

data.name: Admin_CreateCategoryHelp
data.value: Leave parent category empty to create a top-level category. Select a parent to create a subcategory.

data.name: Admin_EditCategoryDesc
data.value: Store view, hierarchy and SEO information for {0} category.

data.name: Admin_StoreConfigurationDesc
data.value: Manage storefront, contact, social media, SEO, shipping and mail notifications from one place.

data.name: Admin_BrandStoreInfoDesc
data.value: Core areas seen by customers such as logo, title, top bar and footer.

data.name: Admin_CampaignMessagePlaceholder
data.value: Cash on delivery and bank transfer

data.name: Admin_ContactInfoDesc
data.value: Used in footer, contact page, mail templates and shipping labels.

data.name: Admin_SocialMediaLinksDesc
data.value: Visible in footer and social link areas.

data.name: Admin_SalesShippingOperationDesc
data.value: Settings used in cart, product detail, trust areas and order operations.

data.name: Admin_AllowOutOfStockPurchase
data.value: Allow purchase when out of stock

data.name: Admin_AllowOutOfStockPurchaseHint
data.value: Can be used for made-to-order products.

data.name: Admin_ShowOutOfStockVariantsGray
data.value: Show out of stock variants in gray

data.name: Admin_ShowOutOfStockVariantsGrayHint
data.value: When active, sold-out variants appear gray with a "Sold Out" badge; when inactive, they are completely hidden. If "Allow purchase when out of stock" is enabled, this setting has no effect.

data.name: Admin_ShippingCompanyListHint
data.value: You can expand the list from the /Admin/Kargo page and manage active/passive and default company settings.

data.name: Admin_LoginRequiredHint
data.value: When active, categories, products and cart pages cannot be viewed without logging in. Only login, registration and password reset pages are open.

data.name: Admin_PayTRSettingsDesc
data.value: PayTR POS information and return addresses are managed here.

data.name: Admin_PayTRSecurityNotice
data.value: Merchant Key and Merchant Salt are not displayed for security reasons. If left blank, the existing registered value will be preserved.

data.name: Admin_ReceivePaymentWithPayTRHint
data.value: When active, the payment flow will be prepared to use PayTR information.

data.name: Admin_PayTRTestMode
data.value: PayTR should run in test mode

data.name: Admin_PayTRTestModeHint
data.value: Should be kept on before going live.

data.name: Admin_KeepExistingValuePlaceholder
data.value: Leave blank to keep existing value

data.name: Admin_PayTRCallbackURLHint
data.value: Server return address to be reported in the PayTR panel.

data.name: Admin_CODSettingsDesc
data.value: Manage the cash on delivery option and service fee for customers during checkout.

data.name: Admin_EnableCODHint
data.value: When active, customers can choose cash on delivery.

data.name: Admin_CODServiceFeeHint
data.value: Additional service fee added to the order total.

data.name: Admin_CODUpperLimitHint
data.value: Cash on delivery option is disabled for orders above this amount.

data.name: Admin_SEOAnalyticsDesc
data.value: Homepage SEO information, social sharing image and measurement codes.

data.name: Admin_MailNotificationsDesc
data.value: Settings for order, contact, shipping and system notifications.

data.name: Admin_NotificationRecipientEmailHint
data.value: If left blank, site email will be used.

data.name: Admin_BrevoSMTPTestHint
data.value: Sends a test email to the selected recipient.

data.name: Admin_MaintenanceModeDesc
data.value: Used to temporarily close the storefront and show a notice to visitors.

data.name: Admin_MaintenanceModeWarning
data.value: When maintenance mode is active, the storefront will be temporarily closed; admin panel remains open.

data.name: Admin_HelpItem1
data.value: Logo, brand name, top bar and footer are visible in the storefront.

data.name: Admin_HelpItem2
data.value: Contact and social media information is used in footer, mail and contact areas.

data.name: Admin_HelpItem3
data.value: SEO fields feed search engines and social sharing information.

data.name: Admin_HelpItem4
data.value: PayTR settings are used in payment infrastructure configuration.

data.name: Admin_HelpItem5
data.value: Cash on delivery status and service fee are reflected in the order total on the payment page.

data.name: Admin_HelpItem6
data.value: Mail notifications are used in order and operation processes.

data.name: Admin_ChangesTakeEffectAfterSave
data.value: Changes take effect on the site after saving.

data.name: Admin_HomePageSettingsSubtitle
data.value: Manage the homepage hero slider images and videos shown on the live site. If a video exists, the slide changes after the video ends.

data.name: Admin_SliderImageHelp
data.value: This image is used as a fallback if the video cannot load or play.

data.name: Admin_UploadVideoFileHelp
data.value: If no new video is selected, the current video is kept.

data.name: Admin_HomeNoteVideoUrl
data.value: If the video URL is filled, video plays instead of the image on the homepage.

data.name: Admin_HomeNoteSilentVideos
data.value: Videos play muted, without controls and like a background; the next slide starts when the video ends.

data.name: Admin_HomeNotePoster
data.value: The image field is used as a poster/fallback image for video.

data.name: Admin_HomeNoteFormats
data.value: MP4 works; you can use a WebM alternative before publishing for file size.

data.name: Admin_DeleteSectionConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this?

data.name: Admin_AddNewSectionSubtitle
data.value: Add a new content section to the homepage.

data.name: Admin_BannerFieldsCustomOnly
data.value: Banner fields (only valid for custom banner type)

data.name: Admin_ProductBlockHelp
data.value: Displays selected products as a storefront section.

data.name: Admin_CustomBannerHelp
data.value: Full-width banner with image and button.

data.name: Admin_ProductsShownInSectionHelp
data.value: The selected products are shown in this section in order. Click checkboxes to select.

data.name: Admin_SliderManagementSubtitle
data.value: Manage home page slider slides. You can add image or video slides.

data.name: Admin_DragSlidesToReorder
data.value: Drag slides to change the order.

data.name: Admin_NoSlidesYet
data.value: No slides have been added yet. Use the button above to add a new slide.

data.name: Admin_DeleteSlideConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this slide? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Admin_AddNewSlideSubtitle
data.value: Add a new image or video slide to the home page slider.

data.name: Admin_SliderImageDimensionsHelp
data.value: At least 1920x700 px (3840x1400 px recommended for high quality). Upload JPG, PNG, or WEBP.

data.name: Admin_SliderVideoDimensionsHelp
data.value: MP4 is recommended. Maximum file size: 50MB. Recommended resolution: 1920x700 or higher.

data.name: Admin_SliderFilesStorageHelp
data.value: Files are stored permanently on the server:

data.name: Admin_ImageFormatsHelp
data.value: Supported formats: JPG, PNG, WEBP. Maximum file size: 10MB.

data.name: Admin_VideoFormatsHelp
data.value: Supported formats: MP4, WebM. Maximum file size: 50MB.

data.name: Admin_InactiveSlideHiddenHelp
data.value: If made passive, it will not be shown in the slider.

data.name: Admin_PreviewVisibleAfterUpload
data.value: The preview appears when an image or video is uploaded.

data.name: Admin_NewImageReplacesCurrentHelp
data.value: If you upload a new image, the current one will be deleted. Check the box below to delete the image.

data.name: Admin_NewVideoReplacesCurrentHelp
data.value: If you upload a new video, the current one will be deleted. Check the box below to delete the video.

data.name: Admin_CategoryParentHelp
data.value: To create a main category, leave the parent as “Main category”. To create a subcategory, select a suitable parent category.

data.name: Admin_NewsletterSubtitle
data.value: Manage newsletter subscribers, filter them, and export to Excel.

data.name: Admin_SendNewsletterMailSubtitle
data.value: Edit, preview, and send the message to active subscribers in bulk.

data.name: Admin_NewsletterSendConfirm
data.value: The newsletter email will be sent to the selected audience. Continue?

data.name: Admin_DefaultNewsletterSubject
data.value: New products and special offers are waiting for you

data.name: Admin_DefaultNewsletterContent
data.value:
We prepared new products, special offers, and featured collections from our store for you.

You can review selected products and easily place your order with secure payment and careful packaging.

Visit our store to discover new season products.

data.name: Admin_SearchEmailOrIp
data.value: Search by email or IP address

data.name: Admin_NoNewsletterSubscribersFound
data.value: No newsletter subscribers found for this filter.

data.name: Admin_EmailCopyFailed
data.value: Email address could not be copied.

data.name: Admin_ReturnRequestsSubtitle
data.value: Review return requests with customer, order, and product details.

data.name: Admin_ReviewReturnRequestSubtitle
data.value: Check customer, order, and product details before approving or rejecting.

data.name: Admin_CheckOrderBeforeDecision
data.value: Check the order and product information above before deciding.

data.name: Admin_ReturnRequestCompleted
data.value: This return request has been completed.

data.name: Admin_CouponManagementSubtitle
data.value: Manage campaign codes to be used in the cart and checkout flow.

data.name: Admin_UnlimitedLimitHelp
data.value: Enter 0 in the limit field for unlimited usage.

data.name: Admin_NoCouponsYet
data.value: No coupons have been added yet.

data.name: Admin_CouponFormSubtitle
data.value: Fill in the campaign coupon details. Code will be uppercased.

data.name: Admin_CouponSaveFailed
data.value: Errors occurred while saving the coupon:

data.name: Admin_CouponHelpCartCheck
data.value: Coupon validity is checked automatically on the cart page.

data.name: Admin_CouponHelpUsageAfterPayment
data.value: Usage counter increases after payment is completed.

data.name: Admin_CouponHelpFixedLimit
data.value: Coupons that reach their limit are disabled automatically.

data.name: Admin_CouponHelpInactive
data.value: Inactive coupons cannot be applied in the cart.

data.name: Admin_ArchiveCouponConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to archive this coupon?

data.name: Admin_NoSalesData
data.value: No sales data in this period.

data.name: Admin_BulkPriceUpdateSubtitle
data.value: You can perform bulk price updates based on sizes or variations.

data.name: Admin_BuDurumBasvuruYok
data.value: No applications found for this status.

data.name: Admin_ReddetUzeresiniz
data.value: You are about to reject the wholesale application of user.

data.name: Admin_RedSebebiPlaceholder
data.value: Enter rejection reason... (will not be shown to user)

data.name: Admin_AdminKayitGorur
data.value: This will only be visible in admin records.

data.name: Admin_IslemHata
data.value: An error occurred during the operation.

data.name: Admin_WholesaleGroupSubtitle
data.value: Manage wholesale-only product groups and bulk discount rates.

data.name: Admin_GrupSilConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this product group?

data.name: Admin_IskontoYok
data.value: No discount rate defined for this group yet.

data.name: Admin_IskontoSilConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this discount rate?

data.name: Admin_SayfaSubtitle
data.value: Manage pages like About Us, Return Policy.

data.name: Admin_SayfaYonetimAciklama
data.value: Manage corporate page content from here.

data.name: Admin_SayfaIcerikHint
data.value: You may use HTML tags (h1, p, b, br) if needed.

data.name: Admin_SearchNoResults
data.value: No records found matching your criteria.

data.name: Admin_ImportWarning
data.value: Each variation will be imported with its own image. Categories will be auto-detected.

data.name: Admin_SelectCategoryDelete
data.value: Select categories to delete (check category IDs above):

data.name: Admin_FixFrameConfirm
data.value: Ahsap Cerceve will be updated to Ahşap Çerçeve. Continue?

data.name: Admin_SelectOneCategory
data.value: Please select at least one category

data.name: Admin_ImportAllConfirm
data.value: 14 categories will be imported sequentially. This may take a few minutes. Continue?

data.name: Admin_FirebaseNotConfiguredHint
data.value: Fill Firebase settings in appsettings.json to send push notifications.

data.name: Admin_NotificationBodyHint
data.value: Max 500 characters. Keep it short and effective.

data.name: Admin_ClickUrlHint
data.value: Default: homepage. Enter a URL like campaign page.

data.name: Admin_WillBeSentToSubscribers
data.value: This notification will be sent to all subscribers.

data.name: Admin_PushTip1
data.value: Title should be short and eye-catching (max 50 chars).

data.name: Admin_PushTip2
data.value: Message should include a clear call to action.

data.name: Admin_PushTip3
data.value: 1-2 notifications per day is ideal; too many cause unsubscribes.

data.name: Admin_PushTip4
data.value: Send notifications for campaigns, new products, or special days.

data.name: Admin_PushValidationError
data.value: Please fill in title and message fields.

data.name: Admin_StaffManagement_Subtitle
data.value: View admin staff by role, manage sessions, and explore the permission matrix.

data.name: Admin_NoStaff_Desc
data.value: This screen appears empty when there are no users with admin panel access.

data.name: Admin_PermissionMatrix_Subtitle
data.value: Explore which modules each admin role can access in a visual table.

data.name: Admin_PermissionMatrix_Note
data.value: The authorization matrix is read-only. Role definitions are made at the code level.

data.name: Admin_CancelPeriodHours_Hint
data.value: Hours after placing an order during which the customer can cancel. 0 = cancellation disabled.

data.name: Profil_CancelPeriodExpired
data.value: Cancellation period has expired. Your order can only be cancelled within the first {0} hours.

data.name: Profil_CancelNotAllowed
data.value: Cancellation is not available for this order at this time.

data.name: Admin_ProductActiveHelp
data.value: Product can be managed in admin panel.
